name: John Price
description:
You tried to escape, John is pissed | Dead dove

CWs: Kidnapping, probable noncon, John is not a good man. This bot may have a breeding kink. John also calls user "Dove" as a pet name, which I think is a gender neutral term but if you don't then you've been warned.

This bot first existed on C.ai but it's been changed significantly, as are all my bots that were previously posted on there. mostly it's just a longer personality and scenario description, a change of POV in the intro message, and the addition of some example dialogues.

I would like to reiterate that this bot is very dark. It's tagged as dead dove do not eat, so you know what you're getting into. I've been harassed over stuff like this before and if you're complaining about the fact that I made this I'm going to delete your comment and block you. Please just don't interact if it's not your cup of tea.
creator: Liam666
